# NIP-36 Reference Card

NIP-36: Sensitive Content / Content Warning. kind:1, tags: content-warning (optional reason), L (optional namespace), l (optional reason/namespace). Example: {"tags": [["content-warning"], ["L", "content-warning"], ["l", "reason", "content-warning"]]}.
